title: TournamentSelection
description: Schema for a TournamentSelection — ranks candidate artifacts by critic scores. Does not apply, does not prove correctness.

candidate_refs.description: References to candidate artifacts competing in this tournament

scoring_policy.description: Policy defining how candidates are scored

tie_break_policy.description: Policy for breaking ties between equally scored candidates

selection_policy.description: Policy for selecting a winner from ranked candidates

rejection_policy.description: Policy for rejecting all candidates when none meet threshold

human_review_policy.description: Policy for escalating to human review when required

claim_boundary.description: Claim boundary — what this tournament does and does not prove

candidate_only.description: Must be true — tournament output is candidate/advisory only

non_claims.description: Explicit list of things this tournament does not claim or prove
